title: Anthropic 力争恢复 Fable 5 上线
full_text:
Chubby♨️ on X: "Anthropics founder and co founder are working hard to get fable 5 back for everyone.
Looking good, security issues are being addressed. Via Bloomberg https://t.co/BALfhGKUHN" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
Anthropics founder and co founder are working hard to get fable 5 back for everyone.
Looking good, security issues are being addressed. Via Bloomberg
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
17h
Let’s get ready, my friends. Negotiations with Trump appear to be going well, and Anthropic is confident that Fable 5 will be available again in the coming days.
2:15 PM · Jun 18, 2026 38.7K Views
